title: CadStruct RQ Source-Protocol Recovery Plan
strategy: Do not start training. Use external baseline source only as protocol reference, then gate CadStruct with deterministic tests before any validation run.
goal_completion_rule: Current phase is code review only. If a later phase deliberately starts stable CadStruct validation training, mark that future goal complete.

completed_this_pass.summary: Compared VecFormer source and found its query matching is selected-primitive constrained; CadStruct now supports the same constraint for seeded queries with infeasible-matrix fallback.

Compared VecFormer panoptic decode and found semantic remasking before final panoptic output; CadStruct now has an explicit, auditable label_consistent_nonempty remask policy for both window and ownership decode paths.

Kept production defaults unchanged: content/component seeded queries remain disabled in the high-RQ preset, so new sparse matching is available but not silently promoted without an explicit protocol decision.

VecFormer: query initialization: train queries can be sampled from primitive features and carry selected primitive ids
matching: selected primitive must belong to the target mask when sparse matching is feasible
decode: instance masks are semantically remasked before panoptic fusion
score/metric: class score, mask objectness, and log1p-length weighted IoU are part of the protocol
CADTransformer: data: primitive center, neighbor graph, and offset-style structural signals are core inputs
metric: line primitive IoU uses log1p primitive length weighting

pending_tasks.title: Decide seeded-query promotion gate
checks: If enabling --content-seeded-queries or --component-seeded-queries, update preset tests and input protocol ABI deliberately.
Verify selected_primitive_indices diagnostics are non-empty in a smoke batch before using the sparse matcher as an RQ claim.
Do not enable seeded queries together with incompatible old checkpoints or stale input protocol metadata.
pending_tasks.fix_plan: Code capability is implemented. Promotion should be a small config/test patch after v6 cache availability is settled.

pending_tasks.title: Locate or build full v6 windowed cache
checks: Confirm train/val v6 windowed primitive cache exists before changing launch defaults.
Verify v6 lineage forbids semantic_id, instance_id, and page_instance_id as model inputs.
If absent, rebuild cache once; do not train v3/v4 while reporting v6 structural-feature protocol.
pending_tasks.fix_plan: Data build task only; no model training in current phase.

pending_tasks.title: Pre-training protocol smoke only after P0-01/P0-02
checks: Report must expose selected-primitive matching usage, semantic_remask_removed_primitives, admitted coverage, and calibrated RQ.
Run apply with --instance-semantic-remask-policy label_consistent_nonempty only as an explicit ablation/policy choice, not as a hidden default.
Abort if proxy metric configuration differs from official log1p-length weighted primitive IoU.
pending_tasks.fix_plan: After cache/config gate, run a short smoke; still no long training until protocol diagnostics are sane.
